title: Add podman network to bash command completions
body:
network commands were not supported in command completions.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: @vrothberg Actually I duplicated a lot of existing code.  Now the Patch is much simpler.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](?repo=containers%2Flibpod).
